chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 62 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.5 & 17. 2. For hearing of CMA No.1751/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 23.01.2026 Sardar Faisal Zafar, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Khalid Mahmood Rajpar, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent, same is taken on record. Per joint request, it is sought that it would be in the interest of just and revenue for impugned judgment be set aside and the matter be remanded to the original adjudicating authority for denovo proceedings in accordance with law. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
